en.question: Is X>Y? I: X=5. II: Y=3.
en.explanation: Neither alone gives both values. Together: 5>3, sufficient.

en.question: Value of x? I: x²=16. II: x>0.
en.explanation: I: x=±4. II: x>0. Together: x=4.

en.question: Is P divisible by 6? I: P divisible by 2. II: P divisible by 3.
en.explanation: Divisible by 2 and 3 means divisible by 6. Together sufficient.

hi.question: P, 6 से विभाज्य? I: P, 2 से। II: P, 3 से।
hi.explanation: 2 और 3 दोनों से विभाज्य = 6 से विभाज्य।

en.question: Code for BRAVE? I: BRAIN=CSBJO. II: LEAVE=MFBWF.
en.explanation: Either shows each letter +1. Either alone is sufficient.

hi.question: BRAVE का कोड? I: BRAIN=CSBJO। II: LEAVE=MFBWF।
hi.explanation: दोनों से पता चलता है हर अक्षर +1। कोई एक पर्याप्त।

en.question: How is M related to N? I: P brother of M, son of Q. II: N daughter of Q.
en.explanation: Together: M and N are siblings (children of Q). Both needed.

hi.question: M का N से संबंध? I: P,M का भाई,Q का पुत्र। II: N,Q की पुत्री।

en.question: What day today? I: Yesterday Sunday. II: Tomorrow Tuesday.

hi.question: आज कौन-सा दिन? I: कल रविवार। II: कल मंगलवार।
hi.explanation: दोनों से आज सोमवार। कोई एक पर्याप्त।

en.question: Position of A in 40? I: A 25th from right. II: 10 between A and B, B 12th from left.
en.explanation: I: position=16th from left. II: ambiguous (A could be 1st or 23rd). I alone sufficient.

hi.question: 40 में A का स्थान? I: A दाएँ से 25वाँ। II: A-B के बीच 10, B बाएँ 12वाँ।
hi.explanation: I से 16वाँ। II अस्पष्ट। केवल I पर्याप्त।

en.question: Tallest among A-D? I: A>B. II: C<D<A.
en.explanation: Together: A>B and A>D>C. A is tallest.

hi.question: A-D में सबसे लंबा? I: A>B। II: C<D<A।
